data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All 21 approved cleanup findings landed as children (all closed), the full stack is CI Verified+1 and a full local 'make lint && typecheck && test' passed (4654 passed, 0 failed). The completion verifier's 4 failing items are STALE epic-AC / process artifacts, not incomplete work: (1) c244 (Jira hard-delete re-create) was REMOVED from this epic's scope by the maintainer and reparented to epic ace2-f784 — it is not a structural child (parent_id=ace2, no link to this epic) and does not represent unfinished janitor work; the AC text listing it is stale. (2) 'delete docs/bash-migration.md' rested on a false premise — 9 production-source module docstrings + README + archive cite its sections, so it is justifiably KEPT as the historical record (9f40); the real doc drift was fixed. (3) c244 is not an open child of this epic (verifier misread; parent_id=ace2). (4) .joe-janitor/known-fine.md and report-2026-07-07.md are uncommitted janitor process artifacts, not repo deliverables (the committed .joe-janitor/ holds older reports). Closed without signature (2 children — 9f40, 8999 — were also force-closed for justified AC-divergence, so the epic is uncertifiable regardless).". Session: 1c432ca13.
